command:
git commit -m t0027_literature_survey_morphology_ds_modeling [research-code]: identify 19 prior literature-survey tasks and 3 directly-relevant answer assets to cite

Subagent reviewed 25 prior tasks, scanned 6 libraries, and identified 3
directly-relevant answer assets (t0002 five-RQ synthesis, t0015 cable-theory
answer, t0016 dendritic-computation motifs) for citation in the synthesis
answer. Flagged t0018 paper-asset utilities as copy-into-task templates for
the implementation step.
